scripts.build:shared: npm run build --workspace @pharos/config && npm run build --workspace @pharos/types
scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently -n api,web,worker -c cyan,green,yellow "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:worker"
scripts.build:api: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace @pharos/api
scripts.build:worker: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace @pharos/worker
scripts.build:all: npm run build:web && npm run build:api && npm run build:worker
scripts.start:all: concurrently -n api,web,worker -c cyan,green,yellow "npm run start:api" "npm run start:web" "npm run start:worker"
scripts.format:check: prettier --check .github/workflows/ci.yml scripts/gates.mjs README.md package.json apps/api/package.json packages/config/src/index.ts
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:shared && npm run typecheck --workspaces
scripts.db:reset: ts-node packages/db/reset.ts && ts-node packages/db/migrate.ts && ts-node packages/db/seed.ts
